race.description: Corowa Chaff Mill Country Boosted Hcp (C2)
race.comment: JUST HEAR ME OUT (4) starting to build a good record and he gets a similar set-up for this. Relished the inside gate when taken to the front and never headed when scoring a soft win over 1175m at Albury. Proven at the trip and doesn't have to improve much to win this. FORTE CHEVAL (7) comes out of a solid rating race after sitting on the speed for a tenacious second over 1400m here. Set to peak from the good gate and close to a win. DEMI GOD (6) will find this easier and has a sharp turn of foot on his day. Draws well and can pounce on them late. KIRWANS BRIDGE (8) has been rock-solid for the day camp this campaign and will be putting his best foot forward again. Gets weight off with the claim, and is among the main hopes.
